Bash(python3 -c "
import requests
from config import OPEN_METEO_API

lat, lon = 40.8296, -73.9262
resp = requests.get\(
    OPEN_METEO_API,
    params={
        'latitude':         lat,
        'longitude':        lon,
        'hourly':           'temperature_2m,windspeed_10m,winddirection_10m,weathercode',
        'temperature_unit': 'fahrenheit',
        'windspeed_unit':   'mph',
        'timezone':         'auto',
        'forecast_days':    2,
    },
    timeout=15,
\)
data = resp.json\(\)
hourly = data['hourly']
times  = hourly['time']
temps  = hourly['temperature_2m']
winds  = hourly['windspeed_10m']
wdirs  = hourly['winddirection_10m']
wcodes = hourly['weathercode']

print\(f'Timezone: {data[\\"timezone\\"]}'\)
print\(\)
print\(f'{\\"Hour\\":<22} {\\"Temp \(°F\)\\":>10} {\\"Wind \(mph\)\\":>11} {\\"Dir \(°\)\\":>8} {\\"WMO Code\\":>9}'\)
print\('-' * 65\)
for i, t in enumerate\(times\):
    if '2026-03-11' in t:
        print\(f'{t:<22} {temps[i]:>10.1f} {winds[i]:>11.1f} {wdirs[i]:>8.0f} {wcodes[i]:>9}'\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, '.'\)
from modules.weather import fetch_weather, _parse_game_hour_local
from modules.schedule import fetch_schedule

games = fetch_schedule\(\)
print\(f'{'Game':<28} {'ET Time':<16} {'Local Hr':>8} {'Temp°F':>8} {'Wind':>6} {'Desc':<20}'\)
print\('-' * 90\)
for g in games:
    home      = g['home_team']
    game_time = g['game_time']
    local_hr  = _parse_game_hour_local\(game_time\)
    w = fetch_weather\(home, game_time_et=game_time\)
    game_str = f\\"{g['away_team']} @ {home}\\"
    print\(f'{game_str:<28} {game_time:<16} {local_hr:>8} {w[\\"temperature_f\\"]:>8.1f} {w[\\"wind_speed_mph\\"]:>6.1f} {w[\\"wind_desc\\"]:<20}'\)
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "
import analytics
stats = analytics.build_season_stats\(\)
print\('total_tracked:', stats['total_tracked']\)
print\('total_plays:', stats['total_plays']\)
print\('is_spring_training:', stats['is_spring_training']\)
acc = stats['projection_accuracy']
print\('MAE:', acc.get\('mae'\)\)
print\('within_1_run:', acc.get\('within_1_run'\), '%'\)
print\('avg_bias:', acc.get\('avg_bias'\)\)
misses = stats['biggest_misses']
print\('biggest miss:', misses[0]['matchup'], misses[0]['projection_error'], 'runs'\)
" 2>&1)
